import React, { useState } from 'react'; import '../styles/Contact.css'; const Contact = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', phone: '', course: '' }); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const text = `Hi Excel Institute, I am ${formData.name}. I am interested in exploring the ${formData.course} course. My contact number is ${formData.phone}. Please connect with me!`; const whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/919876543210?text=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`; window.open(whatsappUrl, '_blank'); }; return (

); }; export default Contact;
